response.justification: Candidate has 10+ years of full-stack experience well exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with direct hands-on work in the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) at Optilyz and re:cinq. Current role at re:cinq explicitly involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, matching the AI agent development requirement. Strong polyglot background (Java, TypeScript, DLang, C++), TDD/craftsmanship mindset, and architecture experience across micro-services at scale. Gaps include no explicit Nest.js or Vitest mention, limited recent Kotlin exposure, and no clear cloud/Kubernetes depth beyond AWS CDK and self-hosted k8s on a side project.
strengths: Direct AI-agent and MCP development experience at current role aligns with a key requirement
Deep TypeScript/Node.js/React production experience plus polyglot range (Java, DLang, C++, Python-adjacent)
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and open-source maintainership
concerns: Resume does not mention Nest.js or Vitest specifically — testing experience listed is generic
Kotlin/Java experience is older (robotic arms era) rather than recent backend service work
Located in Lagos with a Berlin-oriented work history — timezone/relocation alignment unclear
